comments_made.124: 2026-04-19 root cause analysis of workflow failures

stale_branches_likely_superseded: repo-assist/eng-snprintf-20260324 (snprintf already in main, major conflicts)
notes: Fixes pushed to PRs #126, #139, #140 (README.md conflict resolved via incremental commits). All 3 PRs now have merge-conflict-free branches. Key learning: push_to_pull_request_branch requires INCREMENTAL commits on top of existing remote tip - rebased branches do not work.
